pathAssistantSteps.info:
Understand why the opportunity was lost and identify improvements.


  • Key Actions
    • Select a Loss Reason and provide detail in Loss Reason Details.
    • What contributed to losing this opportunity? What do we need to do differently?
    • Maintain relationships for future opportunities. Schedule a follow-up task or event for this account.

Finalise the successful outcome and transition to delivery.


  • Key Actions:
    • Confirm contract terms and signatures.
    • Hand off to the delivery team.
    • Document key factors that led to the win (e.g., differentiators, stakeholder relationships).


Tip: Celebrate the win with your team and share learnings to replicate success!

Opportunity paused — actively tracking for revival.


  • Exit to the appropriate active stage when the opportunity resumes, or to Closed Lost if it lapses.
  • Key Actions:
    • Record the reason for the hold in Description.
    • Update Close Date to reflect the expected resume date.
    • Schedule a follow-up task or reminder to revisit.

Develop and finalise the bid in response to the RFP.


  • Review the bid plan and confirm decision makers before submission.
  • Exit to Submitted when the bid is ready to deliver.
  • Key Actions:
    • Review and refine the bid plan with internal stakeholders.
    • Confirm key decision makers and their evaluation criteria.
    • Ensure pricing, scope, and differentiators are aligned with the RFP.
    • Schedule follow-up and update next steps before the bid deadline.

Confirm receipt, monitor engagement signals, and prepare for potential next steps.


  • Exit to Closed Won or Closed Lost when the client has made a definitive decision.
  • Key Actions:
    • Confirm receipt of proposal.
    • Monitor engagement (e.g. track email opens, document downloads, or calendar invites).
    • Prepare for next steps.
    • Schedule follow-up. If no response within 5 business days, send a polite check-in email.
